title: Poa oblonga
taxonomy: Poa oblonga is classified as a species of grass within the genus Poa, which belongs to the family Poaceae. This classification places it within the monocotyledonous plants, characterized by having one seed leaf. Poa oblonga is further categorized as a type of cool-season grass, meaning it thrives in temperate climates with moderate temperatures. Within the genus Poa, it is one of several species, each with distinct characteristics and growth habits. Its classification into the family Poaceae reflects its evolutionary relationships with other grasses.
